# Impulse Hammering

**Summary**: A non-destructive method to measure the elastic stiffness of a material.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2023-desouky|Desouky, 2023]] used impulse hammering to quantify the change in elastic stiffness across 30 points on each sample surface.

## Key Results and Findings

- Elastic stiffness increased by up to 181% under specific temperature and pressure conditions. ([[2023-desouky|Desouky, 2023, p. 23]])
